taskTitle: Understand the difference between major and minor shirk
subtaskTitle: Define major shirk (shirk akbar) with examples
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Define major shirk (shirk akbar) with examples' under the parent task 'Understand the difference between major and minor shirk' (module: faith_shahada_growth), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah An-Nisa 4:48 detailing its unforgivable nature and Surah Al-Ma'idah 5:72 providing clear examples of directing worship to other than Allah, that contextually anchor the definition of major shirk (shirk akbar)?

Which authentic narrations, specifically the explicitly defined categories in Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim where the Prophet identifies the greatest of the major sins (Al-Kaba'ir) as associating a partner with Allah when He alone created you, directly anchor the definition and examples of major shirk?
